AA FORM; BAH AFMT Template.pdf.NatOfAct: REQUEST FOR BAH IN CONJUNCTION WITH ADVANCED FAMILY MEMBER TRAVEL
AA FORM; BAH AFMT Template.pdf.SuppInfo: 1. Per the references, I respectfully request BAH in conjunction with advanced family member travel to my next permanent duty station.2.  I understand BAH authorization or adjustments will not occur until the latest of the following:     -The day after I have vacated family-type government quarters at my permanent duty station (PDS).     -The day Basic Orders to the future PDS are funded.  This does not include Basic Orders of Intent.     -The day my dependents complete their PCS travel and arrive IVO my future PDS.  My BAH authorization or adjustment may be delayed if my dependents conduct stops or delays en-route to my future PDS. 3. The following is provided:    a. Present PDS:  UNIT, STATION, CITY, STATE, COUNTRY    b. Future PDS:  UNIT, STATION, CITY, STATE, COUNTRY    c. Dependent data:                FName LName - Relation to Marine (Spouse/Son/Daughter, etc.)     d. Date Basic Orders were generated: DD Mon YY    e. Estimated date of dependent(s) departure from vicinity of Present Unit: DD Mon YY.    f. Estimated date of dependent(s) arrival to vicinity of Future Unit: DD Mon YY.    g. Estimated date of your detachment from Present Unit: DD Mon YY4. For questions regarding this matter, I can be reached at DSN (XXX) XXX-XXXX or EMAIL@USMC.MIL.                                                                                                                 FI. MI. LNAME

AA-Form-RA-SgtMaj-Billet.pdf.NatOfAct: INTENT TO ACCEPT RESERVE FIRST SERGEANT OR SERGEANT MAJOR BILLET ASSIGNMENT
AA-Form-RA-SgtMaj-Billet.pdf.SuppInfo: 1.  The following are the Reserve 1stSgt/SgtMaj billets listed in order of preference for which I would like to be considered during the FY20 Reserve (SMCR-IRR) SNCO selection board:        Unit                                         Location                                            BICa.  SAMPLE                              Elmendorf, AK                              M1111111111b.  SAMPLE                              Bessemer, AL                                M2222222222c.  SAMPLE                              Salt Lake City, UT                         M3333333333d.  SAMPLE                              Buffalo, NY                                   M4444444444e.  SAMPLE                              Niagara Falls, NY                          M5555555555(List all billets willing to accept.  If you are willing to accept any available billet, state so in the body of the AA Form as such, do not list every open billet individually)2.  If selected to 1stSgt/SgtMaj, I will accept any billet assignment listed above, however, I understand that all assignments will be made based on the needs of the Marine Corps, and that failure to accept an assignment may result in revocation of my selection to 1stSgt/SgtMaj and involuntary transfer to the Individual Ready Reserve.  I am also willing to incur a three (3) mandatory service obligation to accept this promotion.3.  For additional information I can be reached at (XXX)XXX-XXXX or via email at i.m.marine@usmc.mil.                                                                                                                     Sign here                                                                                                                     I. M. MARINE

AA-Form-not-to-be-O6-level-SgtMaj-slate..SuppInfo: 1.  I request to not be considered for the O6 level SgtMaj slate.2.  I understand that I will not be reassigned due to this request and will either drop to the IRR or submit for retirement.3.  For additional information I can be reached at (XXX)XXX-XXXX or via email at i.m.marine@usmc.mil.                                                                                                                     delete this and sign here                                                                                                                     I. M. MARINE

Redesignation - Page 11.pdf.Remarks1: ____________: I have been counseled by my Commanding Officer this date that I must incur an additional 24-month Obligated Service (OBS) upon acceptance of redesignation to the rank of First Sergeant. Also, I understand that if selected for redesignation, I will not be eligible for promotion to Sergeant Major until I have served 2 years time in grade as a First Sergeant, and that I may receive permanent change of station orders requiring me to obligate additional service. ________________________________________________________ (Marines Signature)           ________________________________________________________ (Commanding Officers Signature)
